creator: rdunkle@smallcatbrain.com
text:
starfive vf2-  booting from sdcard using the sysutils/u-boot-starfive-visionfive2.
I am using the dtb file from: https://github.com/starfive-tech/VisionFive2/releases/download/JH7110_VF2_515_v5.10.3/jh7110-visionfive-v2.dtb
I am using memstick image. FreeBSD 14.0-STABLE #0 stable/14-dcae96578
There appears to be no storage devices found.
